name: Grand Prix Golf Club
notes: Auto/racing themed course — each hole sponsored by an automobile brand; sports-rim buggies, car banners on course. Created in 2011 by the Thai organiser of the Bangkok Motor Show (per thailandgolfers.com). Address: 91 Moo 13 Chongdan, Bo Phloi, Kanchanaburi 71160. Weekday 1,600 THB / weekend 2,100 THB from golfsavers.com; some sources quote a bundled all-in rate of ~3,000 THB including cart+caddie. Caddie (400 THB) and cart (600 THB) both compulsory per golfdigg.com and thailandgolfers.com. Cart noted at 1,000 THB on one golfasian page — may be a different cart type or outdated. Club rental 1,000 THB per golfasian.com. Shoe rental 200 THB. Accommodation on-site (50 rooms). Night golf available. Distance from Bangkok quoted as 'approximately 2 hours'; Bo Phloi is ~130-160 km from Bangkok on Hwy 3086. GPS coordinates not found online — course is in Tambon Chong Dan, Amphoe Bo Phloi. Phone also cited as +66-90-443-8880 and +66-86-311-4953. 7,136 yards (some sources: 6,525 m / 7,111 yards — discrepancy may reflect different tees). Sources: golfasian.com, golfsavers.com, golfdigg.com, thailandgolfers.com, golflux.com, tripadvisor.com
